  9→class TextQuoteCreator(
 10→    private val quoteDateFormatter: QuoteDateFormatter,
 11→    private val resourceProvider: CoreResourceProvider,
 12→) {
 13→    private val prefixInsertionRegex = Regex("(?m)^")
 14→
 15→    fun quoteOriginalTextMessage(
 16→        originalMessage: Message,
 17→        messageBody: String?,
 18→        quoteStyle: QuoteStyle,
 19→        prefix: String,
 20→    ): String {
 21→        val body = messageBody ?: ""
 22→        return when (quoteStyle) {
 23→            QuoteStyle.PREFIX -> prefixQuoteText(body, originalMessage, prefix)
 24→            QuoteStyle.HEADER -> headerQuoteText(body, originalMessage)
 25→        }
 26→    }
 27→
 28→    private fun prefixQuoteText(body: String, originalMessage: Message, prefix: String): String {
 29→        val sentDate = quoteDateFormatter.format(originalMessage.sentDate)
 30→        val sender = Address.toString(originalMessage.from)
 31→
 32→        return buildString {
 33→            val replyHeader = if (sentDate.isEmpty()) {
 34→                resourceProvider.replyHeader(sender)
 35→            } else {
 36→                resourceProvider.replyHeader(sender, sentDate)
 37→            }
 38→            append(replyHeader)
 39→            append(CRLF)
 40→
 41→            val escapedPrefix = Regex.escapeReplacement(prefix)
 42→            val prefixedText = body.replace(prefixInsertionRegex, escapedPrefix)
 43→
 44→            append(prefixedText)
 45→        }
 46→    }
 47→
 48→    private fun headerQuoteText(body: String, originalMessage: Message): String {
 49→        val sentDate = quoteDateFormatter.format(originalMessage.sentDate)
 50→
 51→        return buildString {
 52→            append(CRLF)
 53→            append(resourceProvider.messageHeaderSeparator())
 54→            append(CRLF)
 55→
 56→            originalMessage.from.displayString()?.let { fromAddresses ->
 57→                append(resourceProvider.messageHeaderFrom())
 58→                append(" ")
 59→                append(fromAddresses)
 60→                append(CRLF)
 61→            }
 62→
 63→            if (sentDate.isNotEmpty()) {
 64→                append(resourceProvider.messageHeaderDate())
 65→                append(" ")
 66→                append(sentDate)
 67→                append(CRLF)
 68→            }
 69→
 70→            originalMessage.getRecipients(RecipientType.TO).displayString()?.let { toAddresses ->
 71→                append(resourceProvider.messageHeaderTo())
 72→                append(" ")
 73→                append(toAddresses)
 74→                append(CRLF)
 75→            }
 76→
 77→            originalMessage.getRecipients(RecipientType.CC).displayString()?.let { ccAddresses ->
 78→                append(resourceProvider.messageHeaderCc())
 79→                append(" ")
 80→                append(ccAddresses)
 81→                append(CRLF)
 82→            }
 83→
 84→            originalMessage.subject?.let { subject ->
 85→                append(resourceProvider.messageHeaderSubject())
 86→                append(" ")
 87→                append(subject)
 88→                append(CRLF)
 89→            }
 90→
 91→            append(CRLF)
 92→            append(body)
 93→        }
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    private fun Array<Address>.displayString() = Address.toString(this)?.let { if (it.isEmpty()) null else it }
 97→
 98→    companion object {
 99→        private const val CRLF = "\r\n"
100→    }
101→}

  9→class TextQuoteCreator(
 10→    private val quoteDateFormatter: QuoteDateFormatter,
 11→    private val resourceProvider: CoreResourceProvider,
 12→) {
 13→    private val prefixInsertionRegex = Regex("(?m)^")
 14→
 15→    fun quoteOriginalTextMessage(
 16→        originalMessage: Message,
 17→        messageBody: String?,
 18→        quoteStyle: QuoteStyle,
 19→        prefix: String,
 20→    ): String {
 21→        val body = messageBody ?: ""
 22→        return when (quoteStyle) {
 23→            QuoteStyle.PREFIX -> prefixQuoteText(body, originalMessage, prefix)
 24→            QuoteStyle.HEADER -> headerQuoteText(body, originalMessage)
 25→        }
 26→    }
 27→
 28→    private fun prefixQuoteText(body: String, originalMessage: Message, prefix: String): String {
 29→        val sentDate = quoteDateFormatter.format(originalMessage.sentDate)
 30→        val sender = Address.toString(originalMessage.from)
 31→
 32→        return buildString {
 33→            val replyHeader = if (sentDate.isEmpty()) {
 34→                resourceProvider.replyHeader(sender)
 35→            } else {
 36→                resourceProvider.replyHeader(sender, sentDate)
 37→            }
 38→            append(replyHeader)
 39→            append(CRLF)
 40→
 41→            val escapedPrefix = Regex.escapeReplacement(prefix)
 42→            val prefixedText = body.replace(prefixInsertionRegex, escapedPrefix)
 43→
 44→            append(prefixedText)
 45→        }
 46→    }
 47→
 48→    private fun headerQuoteText(body: String, originalMessage: Message): String {
 49→        val sentDate = quoteDateFormatter.format(originalMessage.sentDate)
 50→
 51→        return buildString {
 52→            append(CRLF)
 53→            append(resourceProvider.messageHeaderSeparator())
 54→            append(CRLF)
 55→
 56→            originalMessage.from.displayString()?.let { fromAddresses ->
 57→                append(resourceProvider.messageHeaderFrom())
 58→                append(" ")
 59→                append(fromAddresses)
 60→                append(CRLF)
 61→            }
 62→
 63→            if (sentDate.isNotEmpty()) {
 64→                append(resourceProvider.messageHeaderDate())
 65→                append(" ")
 66→                append(sentDate)
 67→                append(CRLF)
 68→            }
 69→
 70→            originalMessage.getRecipients(RecipientType.TO).displayString()?.let { toAddresses ->
 71→                append(resourceProvider.messageHeaderTo())
 72→                append(" ")
 73→                append(toAddresses)
 74→                append(CRLF)
 75→            }
 76→
 77→            originalMessage.getRecipients(RecipientType.CC).displayString()?.let { ccAddresses ->
 78→                append(resourceProvider.messageHeaderCc())
 79→                append(" ")
 80→                append(ccAddresses)
 81→                append(CRLF)
 82→            }
 83→
 84→            originalMessage.subject?.let { subject ->
 85→                append(resourceProvider.messageHeaderSubject())
 86→                append(" ")
 87→                append(subject)
 88→                append(CRLF)
 89→            }
 90→
 91→            append(CRLF)
 92→            append(body)
 93→        }
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    private fun Array<Address>.displayString() = Address.toString(this)?.let { if (it.isEmpty()) null else it }
